message:
refactor(wizard): modernize install-terminal page with design system

Comprehensive UI refresh of the install-terminal wizard step to align
with the Terminal Noir design system and improve visual consistency.

New TerminalCard component (local to this page):
- Reusable card for terminal download links (Ghostty, WezTerm, etc.)
- Hover states with border-primary/30, shadow-md elevation
- Smooth color transitions on text and icons
- Proper external link icon placement and accessibility

Layout and typography improvements:
- Add Terminal icon in rounded-xl container with primary/20 background
- Page title uses gradient text (foreground to muted-foreground)
- Add "~2 min" time estimate below title for user expectation
- Emphasize key terms with text-foreground on <strong> elements
- Fix CommandCard indentation alignment issue

AlertCard integration:
- Replace manual green Card styling with AlertCard variant="success"
- Consistent with other wizard pages using AlertCard component
- Includes Check icon and proper semantic styling
- Removes duplicate icon/layout code

Component cleanup:
- Remove Card import (no longer needed)
- Add AlertCard import from @/components/alert-card
- Add cn utility import for className merging

These changes reduce code duplication, improve visual consistency
with other wizard steps, and enhance the overall polish of the
terminal installation experience for new users.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
